spec.name: The Great Eastern Desert
spec.description: A vast desert stretches for miles, the sands constantly shifting around you. A pyramid lies to the north.

north.description: Sand as far as the eye can see... and a pyramid in the distance.

east.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.
